allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys from datetime import datetime, timedelta cutoff = datetime\(2026, 2, 5\) # 直近7日間 events = [] for line in sys.stdin: try: e = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) if e.get\(''hook_event_name''\) == ''UserPromptSubmit'': ts = e.get\(''timestamp'', ''''\) if ts: dt = datetime.fromisoformat\(ts.replace\(''Z'', ''+00:00''\)\) if dt.replace\(tzinfo=None\) >= cutoff: events.append\({ ''cwd'': e.get\(''cwd'', ''''\), ''prompt_preview'': e.get\(''prompt'', ''''\)[:80], ''ts'': ts[:10] }\) except: pass # Group by project from collections import defaultdict projects = defaultdict\(list\) for ev in events: proj = ev[''cwd''].split\(''/''\)[-1] if ev[''cwd''] else ''unknown'' projects[proj].append\(ev\) for proj, evts in sorted\(projects.items\(\), key=lambda x: -len\(x[1]\)\): print\(f''\\n=== {proj} \({len\(evts\)} sessions\) ===''\) for ev in evts[-10:]: # last 10 per project print\(f"" [{ev[''ts'']}] {ev[''prompt_preview'']}""\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys from datetime import datetime cutoff = datetime\(2026, 2, 5\) events = [] for line in sys.stdin: try: e = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) if e.get\(''hook_event_name''\) == ''UserPromptSubmit'': ts = e.get\(''timestamp'', ''''\) if ts: dt = datetime.fromisoformat\(ts.replace\(''Z'', ''+00:00''\)\) if dt.replace\(tzinfo=None\) >= cutoff: events.append\({ ''cwd'': e.get\(''cwd'', ''''\), ''prompt'': e.get\(''prompt'', ''''\)[:120], ''ts'': ts[:16] }\) except: pass from collections import defaultdict projects = defaultdict\(list\) for ev in events: proj = ev[''cwd''].split\(''/''\)[-1] if ev[''cwd''] else ''unknown'' projects[proj].append\(ev\) for proj, evts in sorted\(projects.items\(\), key=lambda x: -len\(x[1]\)\): print\(f''\\n=== {proj} \({len\(evts\)} prompts\) ===''\) for ev in evts[-15:]: print\(f"" [{ev[''ts'']}] {ev[''prompt''][:100]}""\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) sessions = {} for line in lines: try: event = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) sid = event.get\(''session_id'', ''unknown''\) ts = event.get\(''timestamp'', ''''\) prompt = event.get\(''prompt'', ''''\) tool = event.get\(''tool_name'', ''''\) if prompt: if sid not in sessions: sessions[sid] = {''first_ts'': ts, ''prompts'': [], ''tools'': set\(\)} sessions[sid][''prompts''].append\(prompt[:100]\) sessions[sid][''first_ts''] = min\(sessions[sid][''first_ts''], ts\) if sessions[sid][''first_ts''] else ts if tool: if sid not in sessions: sessions[sid] = {''first_ts'': ts, ''prompts'': [], ''tools'': set\(\)} sessions[sid][''tools''].add\(tool\) except: pass for sid, data in sorted\(sessions.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1].get\(''first_ts'', ''''\), reverse=True\)[:10]: print\(f''=== Session {sid[:8]} \({data[""first_ts""][:10] if data[""first_ts""] else ""?""}\) ===''\) for p in data[''prompts''][:3]: print\(f'' prompt: {p}''\) print\(f'' tools: {"", "".join\(list\(data[""tools""]\)[:5]\)}''\) print\(\) ")
